_note: Runner demo — REAL agent /log outputs. Held-out dataset points are under-counted pre-run carb meals at true intake; guards are correct meals; today is the live playground. Validated: retune ships (fit 73%->83%, USDA held 78%).
profile: I'm a marathon runner carb-loading around training. Before runs and races my carbohydrate portions are much bigger than a normal serving. I keep drizzled toppings light.

corrections.feedback_text: a drizzle of honey is just a tablespoon — way less than you logged, not a giant serving
before my runs I carb-load — my pre-run pasta and carb plates are much bigger than this, closer to a big 250 g cooked serving
